SEARCH
Package compiler.simulation

Class HexState

java.lang.Object
compiler.simulation.HexState
public final class HexState extends Object
Immutable state of a single world hex.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HexState
    critter(Critter critter)
    Creates a critter-containing hex state.
    static HexState
    empty()
    Returns the canonical empty state.
    static HexState
    food(int amount)
    Creates a food-containing hex state.
    Critter
    getCritter()
    Returns the critter occupant.
    int
    getFoodAmount()
    Returns food amount.
    boolean
    hasCritter()
    Indicates whether this hex contains a critter.
    boolean
    hasFood()
    Indicates whether this hex contains food.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Indicates whether this hex is empty (no rock, no food, no critter).
    boolean
    isRock()
    Indicates whether this hex is a rock.
    static HexState
    rock()
    Returns the canonical rock state.
    HexState
    withCritter(Critter critter)
    Returns a state with the given critter occupant.
    HexState
    withFood(int amount)
    Returns a state with updated food amount.
    HexState
    withoutCritter()
    Returns a state without any critter occupant.

  • Method Details

    • rock

      public static HexState rock()
      Returns the canonical rock state.
      Returns:
      immutable rock hex state

    • empty

      public static HexState empty()
      Returns the canonical empty state.
      Returns:
      immutable empty hex state

    • food

      public static HexState food(int amount)
      Creates a food-containing hex state.
      Parameters:
      amount - food amount (must be non-negative)
      Returns:
      state containing the requested amount of food

    • critter

      public static HexState critter(Critter critter)
      Creates a critter-containing hex state.
      Parameters:
      critter - critter occupant
      Returns:
      state containing the given critter

    • isRock

      public boolean isRock()
      Indicates whether this hex is a rock.
      Returns:
      true when rock terrain

    • hasFood

      public boolean hasFood()
      Indicates whether this hex contains food.
      Returns:
      true when food amount is positive

    • getFoodAmount

      public int getFoodAmount()
      Returns food amount.
      Returns:
      food amount, zero when none

    • hasCritter

      public boolean hasCritter()
      Indicates whether this hex contains a critter.
      Returns:
      true when a critter is present

    • getCritter

      public Critter getCritter()
      Returns the critter occupant.
      Returns:
      critter instance, or null if none

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Indicates whether this hex is empty (no rock, no food, no critter).
      Returns:
      true when empty

    • withFood

      public HexState withFood(int amount)
      Returns a state with updated food amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - food amount to set
      Returns:
      updated hex state

    • withCritter

      public HexState withCritter(Critter critter)
      Returns a state with the given critter occupant.
      Parameters:
      critter - critter to place
      Returns:
      updated hex state

    • withoutCritter

      public HexState withoutCritter()
      Returns a state without any critter occupant.
      Returns:
      updated hex state
